title: How to set up BackShip shipping methods
bodyHtml:
In this article, we’ll include all the information you need to set up BackShip correctly in your Back Office.  


What shipping providers are available in each country?


 
 

How do I add BackShip as my shipping method?


Make sure you’ve added your return address before setting up the shipping methods. Once that’s done, follow the instructions below:

1. Go to the “Options” section in your Back Office

 

2. Switch to the “Delivery” tab 

 


3. Scroll down and select the country you want to ship to

 


4. Enter the shipping information by choosing the Backship carrier you will use for the shipment.

 

Can I use BackShip for returns?


If your customer requests a return for a change of mind, technical defect, etc., go to the after-sales service conversation, click the "Generate a return label" button, which will generate a BackShip return label. This label needs to be attached to the return package and is automatically sent to the customer with the necessary instructions like packaging, drop-off point, etc. The package tracking URL is automatically loaded in your Back Office for both you and your customer to track.
 

How do I set up a regular pickup?


One of BackShip’s main benefits is that you can opt to have a regular pickup directly to your address in addition to the automatic pickup included on the service for some shipping providers.

Follow the instructions in this article
